free_text: The elastic scattering of intermediate energy protons
Energy resolution between 0.7 and 1.0 MeV depending on
plastic scintillator between scattering chamber and
spectrometer and thick scintillator beyond the focal

scattering from CH2 target of an in-beam polarimeter.

compared with results of Impulse Approximation
